banner.offline: You're offline — changes are saved on this device and will sync when you reconnect.
banner.needsLogin: Your session expired. Log in again to finish syncing your changes.

conflict.title: Some changes couldn't be saved
conflict.intro: The server rejected these changes — usually because the stock would go invalid. Discard them, or edit again.

toast.syncFailedNeedsLogin: Couldn't sync — please log in again.
